positions.thesis: Cash equivalent position in short-term Treasury bills. Safety allocation while seeking high-conviction opportunities.
Short duration bet against long-term treasuries. Rates higher for longer thesis.
positions.invalidation: Fed pivots to aggressive rate cuts. Recession triggers flight to safety.

positions.thesis: AI semiconductor leader. Custom ASIC solutions for hyperscalers. VMware acquisition adds enterprise software recurring revenue.
positions.invalidation: ASIC demand slows. VMware integration struggles. Hyperscaler insourcing accelerates.

positions.thesis: AI data centre power bottleneck. Bloom Energy makes solid oxide fuel cells for on-site data centre power. Largest position in Aschenbrenner's fund at 15.87%. $5B Brookfield partnership. $20B total backlog. Revenue guided $3.2B for 2026 (+50% YoY). The market prices BE as an energy company - it's an AI infrastructure company.
positions.invalidation: Data centre power demand slows. Grid capacity expands faster than expected. Insider selling accelerates. Natural gas spike makes fuel cells uneconomic.
